_comment: Kafka topic definitions for nGX local development. Partition count and replication factor are set to 1 for single-broker dev environments. Increase partitions and replication in staging/production to match throughput and HA requirements.

topics.name: email.inbound.raw
topics.description: Raw inbound email payloads written by the SMTP listener before any processing. Consumers: email-pipeline service.

topics.name: email.outbound.queue
topics.description: Outbound email send requests enqueued by the API. Consumers: email-pipeline service (SMTP relay).

topics.name: events.fanout
topics.description: Domain events fan-out bus. All domain events (email.received, email.sent, thread.created, etc.) are published here. Consumers: event-dispatcher, webhook-service, search service.

topics.name: webhooks.delivery
topics.description: Pending webhook delivery tasks. Published by event-dispatcher. Consumed by webhook-service for HTTP delivery with exponential-backoff retries.
